blockers.description: GSD tooling cannot find phases 54-59 via init phase-op or init plan-phase — milestone scope parser doesn't recognize v2.0 range despite correct ROADMAP.md entries
blockers.workaround: Executor agents find phases correctly. Orchestrator commands need manual workarounds (create dirs, commit manually). Or fix gsd-tools milestone parser.

decisions.decision: SDK types are canonical for tasks (not pmcp-tasks)
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth, pmcp-tasks re-exports

decisions.decision: Simple interval polling (2-5s), no SSE notifications
decisions.rationale: Stateless, works everywhere, replaces complex SSE

decisions.decision: TaskStore trait + InMemoryTaskStore in SDK, DynamoDB/Redis in pmcp-tasks
Full lifecycle: create, get, list, cancel, TTL, task variables
decisions.rationale: All operations included per user decision

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 55 to create execution plans. If gsd-tools can't find phase 55, create plans manually following the same pattern as phases 53-54.
context_notes: Massive session: shipped v1.20.0, completed phases 52-54, captured context for 55. The v2.0 milestone is well-defined with 6 phases (54-59). Phase 54 was the biggest (protocol upgrade, 4 plans, 68 files). Review agents caught real issues (boxed enum variants, dead code). Composition team DX feedback added phases 58-59. Discovery endpoint implemented for cargo-pmcp.
